name: test_attach_button_present_and_opens_picker
description:
Attach button opens file picker dialog.

        Steps:
        1. Open Support Assistant
        2. Verify attach button is visible
        3. Click attach button
        4. Verify file chooser dialog opens

        Covers: 7.1.1, 7.1.2
